title: Badge: Money Gardener
resultGreatDescription: You made {{score}} smart money decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
skillsDescription: You learned to save wisely, be patient, and make balanced spending choices!
wisdomDescription: These habits help your money grow like a healthy garden.
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart money decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepTip: Save most, stay patient, and spend with a plan.

challenges.title: Birthday Money
challenges.question: You got ₹100 for your birthday. What will you do?

feedback.correct: Excellent! Saving most of your money helps it grow.
feedback.wrong: Saving money helps it grow like a seed.

challenges.title: Patience Practice
challenges.question: Your friend bought a new toy, but you are saving. What do you do?

feedback.correct: Perfect! Patience helps your money garden grow.
feedback.wrong: Stay patient. Savings grow over time.

challenges.title: Toy Goal
challenges.question: You want a ₹500 toy but have ₹300 saved. What is smart?

options.text: Borrow from parents and buy now

feedback.correct: Amazing! Reaching your goal by saving is smart.
feedback.wrong: Keep saving until you reach your goal.

challenges.title: Grandma's Offer
challenges.question: Grandma will add 10% if you wait one month. What do you choose?

feedback.correct: Great! Waiting can help money grow.
feedback.wrong: When money can earn more money, patience helps.

challenges.title: Big Savings
challenges.question: After months, you saved ₹1000. What is wisest?

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Balanced saving and spending is smart.
feedback.wrong: Save most, and spend some thoughtfully.
